name: Code Wizard Pack
description: Complete coding toolkit: review, refactor, debug, generate tests, explain code, convert languages.
author: DevTools Team

skills.name: Code Review
skills.prompt:
Review this code for bugs, security issues, and improvements:

```
{{input}}
```

Provide specific, actionable feedback.

skills.name: Refactor
skills.prompt:
Refactor this code to be cleaner, more readable, and follow best practices:

```
{{input}}
```

skills.name: Debug Assistant
skills.prompt:
Debug this code and find the bug:

```
{{input}}
```

Explain the bug and provide the fix.

skills.name: Explain Code
skills.prompt:
Explain this code line by line, in plain English:

```
{{input}}
```

skills.name: Convert Language
skills.prompt:
Convert this code to Python (or specify target language in input):

```
{{input}}
```
